_meta.description: Maps each control panel section to its permitted archetype frames. Services must use these archetypes — no custom shells.

dashboard.notes: Top-level KPI summary and metrics. No queue, no editor.

operations.notes: Live operations room, order queues, delivery detail views.

finance.notes: READ-ONLY. No payment mutation, refund, settlement write. WLT boundary.

catalogs.notes: Product catalog CRUD — table, edit form, review/approve.

partners.notes: Partner onboarding queue, partner detail, review workflow.

marketing.notes: Campaign overview, content editor, campaign metrics.

support.notes: Support ticket queue and ticket detail view.

administration.notes: User management table and admin settings.

hr.notes: Staff records table and onboarding/offboarding queues.
